title: Episode 1
overview: Jim prepares for another day at work as a guard at White Prison. During his commute, he notices that something is off.

title: Episode 2
overview: As Jim scavenges through broken pieces of equipment, Walter reluctantly lends a hand. They manage to signal for help but must escape discreetly.

title: Episode 3
overview: Jim has a flashback to his childhood self with Ed and Marnie. Back in reality, an unlikely ally rescues him from the rubble.

title: Episode 4
overview: Devastated by the horrendous sight, Jim rushes to save Ed. But they are no match against the deadly beast.

title: Episode 5
overview: Ambushed while using the restroom, Jim regains consciousness behind bars. Worried about Marnie, he must think on his feet.

title: Episode 6
overview: After Dr. Hadson blacks out, Marnie attempts to take over the navigation. Meanwhile, Boyd and Rachel provide vital information regarding the Swarm.

title: Episode 7
overview: All hope is lost, but nature doesn’t wait — Marnie goes into labor. Walter reveals the truth about his dark past.

title: Episode 8
overview: With everyone's support, Jim sets his plan in motion to bait the Swarm. All seems to go well until Howard goes rogue.
